title: Enai Marubadi Marubadi Lyrics Nannbenda Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Ennai marubadi marubadi Song Lyrics From Nannbenda
Singers: Vijay Prakash, Megha
Lyrics : Karky

Enai marubadi marubadi
marubadi thirumbiye paarththaal.
Pon muruvalil muruvalil
muruvalil irudhayam eerthaal.

Aval ennai paarththa kanam
en kaattril engum manam
ini naanum naanum
kadhal kondorinam

Aval pinne sendren dhinam
Naan sonnen endhan manam
aval aettrukondaal
vazhve kadhal varam.

Meendum meendum
avalin pinne kadhal kaettu
alaindhaen naaney.

Vaarthai yaedhum
udhirthidaamal
paarvai ondril sonnaale.

Enai marubadi marubadi
marubadi thirumbiye paarththaal.
Pon muruvalil muruvalil
muruvalil irudhayam eerthaal.

Sorkkal kondu kadhal sonnal
kaadhai moodi kolvaal endre.
Mounam kondu sonneney.

Pookkal thandhu kadhal sonnaal
thooki veesi poval endrae.
kuppai koodai thandheney.

Aval kalaiyile
sendra saalayile
naan maalaitheyum podhum
yaen nindren.

Aval polirukkum
sila magaliridam
naan aasayodu pesiye
yaen nindraen.

Aval ennai paarththa kanam
en kaattril engum manam
ini naanum naanum
kadhal kondorinam

Aval pinne sendren dhinam
Naan sonnen endhan manam
aval aettrukondaal
vazhve kadhal varam.

Eppodhum pol thendral illai
eppodhum pol swasam illai
indro naettrai pol illai.

Eppodhum pol paadal illai
ippodhu adhil arththam kollai
yaarum vilakkavillai.

Aval adaigalil
ulla niram thavira,
en boomyi engum
vannam yaen illai.

Aval paarvayile
ulla oli thavira
en vaanam engum
jothi yaen illai.

Aval ennai paarththa kanam
en kaattril engum manam
ini naanum naanum
kadhal kondorinam

Aval pinne sendren dhinam
Naan sonnen endhan manam
aval aettrukondaal
vazhve kadhal varam.

Meendum meendum
avalin pinne kadhal kaettu
alaindhaen naaney.

Vaarthai yaedhum
udhirthidaamal
paarvai ondril sonnaale.

Enai marubadi marubadi
marubadi thirumbiye paarththaal.
Pon muruvalil muruvalil
muruvalil irudhayam eerthaal.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Enai Marubadi Marubadi expresses deep romantic feelings and the longing for love, highlighting the emotional connection between lovers.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Nannbenda, this song plays during a pivotal moment that showcases the blossoming romance between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional narrative of the film.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Megha and Vijay Prakash, who bring the lyrics to life with their melodious rendition.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics for Enai Marubadi Marubadi were penned by Karky, known for his poetic and expressive writing style.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 23, 2014, as part of the movie Nannbenda.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Enai Marubadi Marubadi from the movie Nannbenda is a romantic duet that beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and longing. Sung by Megha and Vijay Prakash, the melody is both soothing and uplifting, making it perfect for romantic occasions. The lyrics by Karky convey deep emotions, reflecting the joy and excitement of being in love. This song is sure to resonate with anyone who cherishes the moments of romance in their lives.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enai Marubadi Marubadi from Nannbenda is a captivating romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Megha and Vijay Prakash, this song creates a dreamy atmosphere that resonates with anyone who has experienced love's magic. The heartfelt lyrics by Karky add depth, making it a must-listen for all romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: If you look back at me again and again, my heart will be filled with your golden smile.
When she looked at me, my heart was filled with love everywhere in the wind. Now I too have fallen in love.
Every day I followed her, I told her that my heart would be blessed with love if she accepted me.
Again and again, I chased after her love, I was lost in it.
Without saying any words, just with a glance, everything was understood.
If you look back at me again and again, my heart will be filled with your golden smile.
When love is spoken with words, it will end the story. I spoke in silence.
When flowers are offered in love, they will be taken away. I have given a garbage bag.
In the art of her beauty, I have been standing still, wondering why I am waiting.
I spoke with desire to some girls who are as beautiful as her.
When she looked at me, my heart was filled with love everywhere in the wind. Now I too have fallen in love.
Every day I followed her, I told her that my heart would be blessed with love if she accepted me.
There is no breeze like before, there is no breath like before, it is not like the previous day.
There is no song like before, now it has no meaning, no one can explain it.
Except for the color in her eyes, why is there no beauty in my world?
Except for the light in her gaze, why is there no brightness in my sky?
When she looked at me, my heart was filled with love everywhere in the wind. Now I too have fallen in love.
Every day I followed her, I told her that my heart would be blessed with love if she accepted me.
Again and again, I chased after her love, I was lost in it.
Without saying any words, just with a glance, everything was understood.
If you look back at me again and again, my heart will be filled with your golden smile.
